item.title: Counterbalanced Design of Self-Assembled Network-Reinforced In-Situ Polymer Electrolytes for Decoupled Ion Transport and Interface Stability

Source: Nano Energy

Author(s): Jianwei Qiu, Xiangyu Zhang, Yongtao Zhao, Qianqian Fu, Jiaxuan Feng, Chao Xu, Fei Ding, Ning Liu, Pengchao Si

Source: Nano Energy, Volume 156

item.title: Nanoconfined iontronics: Modular nano-bricks for programmable ion transport
item.description:

Source: Nano Energy, Volume 155

Author(s): Lixue Yang, Ari Ivaska, Zhe Wang, Carita Kvarnström, Zhong Lin Wang, Di Wei

item.title: A Dynamically Cross-Linked LA/Arg/NMA Hydrogel with Integrated Self-Adhesion, Self-Healing, and Ionic Conductivity for Flexible Wearable Sensors and Triboelectric Nanogenerators

Publication date: Available online 4 June 2026
